title: May 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 3''' is the 123rd day of the year (124th in leap years). There are 242 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Larry Brandenburg]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Michael Gould]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Tommy Gormley]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 13|''Star Wars Weekly'' 13]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Marvel Super Special 27|''Marvel Super Special'' 27: ''Return of the Jedi'']] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 150|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 150]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Anna Rust]] is born.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (junior novelization)|''Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace'' junior novelization]] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars: Episode I (toy line)|''Star Wars: Episode I'' toy line]] launched.
*1999 – [[Star Wars: I Am a Droid (Random House)|''Star Wars: I Am a Droid'']] published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars Journal: Anakin Skywalker]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars Journal: Queen Amidala]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – [[Celebration II]] begins.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (soundtrack)|''Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith'' soundtrack]] released.
*[[2006]] – [[StarWars.com]] announces the unaltered [[original trilogy]] to be released on [[Star Wars home video releases#2006|DVD]] [[September 12]], 2006.
*2006 – Star Wars Wiki em Português founded.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Activity Annual: Summer Edition 2010]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.20]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.33]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Bloodline (novel)|''Bloodline'']] published.
*2016 – ''[[Ultimate Factivity Collection: LEGO Star Wars]]'' published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Insider 165|''Star Wars Insider'' 165]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Poe Dameron 14|''Poe Dameron'' 14]] published.
*2017 – [[Rogue One Adaptation 2|''Rogue One Adaptation'' 2]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Jabba the Hutt - Galactic Gangster]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – "[[Blasters and Ranged Weapons]]" published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[The Bad Batch: Hunted!]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The Mandalorian: The Rescue]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The Legend of Obi-Wan Kenobi]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Vol. 3 – Jedi's End]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Empire Omnibus Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Insider 210]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 33|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 33]] published.
*2023 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 31|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 31]] published.
*2023 – [[Return of the Jedi – Lando 1|''Return of the Jedi'' – Lando 1]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars (2020) 34|''Star Wars'' (2020) 34]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2022) 4|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2022) 4]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures – The Nameless Terror 3|''The High Republic Adventures – The Nameless Terror'' 3]] published.
*2023 – [[Yoda 7|''Yoda'' 7]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Free Comic Book Day 2025: Star Wars 1|''Free Comic Book Day 2025: Star Wars'' 1]] published.
*2025 – ''[[Free Comic Book Day 2025: All Ages]]'' published.
